message:
🌱 Add vllm: [Feature]: Support Gemma3 GGUF mission (#849)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-14753-feature-support-gemma3-gguf",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support Gemma 3 GGUF",
+    "description": "Add support for loading and serving Google Gemma 3 models in GGUF quantized format via vLLM. This enables running Gemma 3 models (e.g., gemma-3-27b-it) with reduced VRAM usage through GGUF quantization. Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vLLM setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n# or\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n```\nGemma 3 GGUF support requires a recent version of vLLM with GGUF loading support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Obtain a Gemma 3 GGUF model",
+        "description": "Download a GGUF-quantized Gemma 3 model from HuggingFace:\n- [bartowski/google_gemma-3-27b-it-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/bartowski/google_gemma-3-27b-it-GGUF)\n\nChoose a quantization level based on your available VRAM (e.g., Q4_K_M for a good balance of quality and memory usage)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Serve Gemma 3 GGUF with vLLM",
+        "description": "Start the vLLM server with the Gemma 3 GGUF model:\n```bash\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model <path-to-gemma3-gguf> \\\n  --tokenizer google/gemma-3-27b-it\n```\nThe GGUF weights are dequantized at load time for inference."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Gemma 3 GGUF inference works",
+        "description": "Test that Gemma 3 GGUF model serving is working:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"gemma-3-27b-it\", \"messages\": [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Explain quantum computing briefly.\"}], \"max_tokens\": 100}'\n```\nYou should receive a valid chat completion response from the GGUF-quantized Gemma 3 model."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added support for Gemma 3 models in GGUF format by extending the GGUF weight loading infrastructure to handle the Gemma 3 architecture. This enables users to run quantized Gemma 3 models with reduced VRAM requirements while leveraging vLLM's high-throughput serving capabilities.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Serve Gemma 3 GGUF model\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model <path-to-gemma3-gguf> \\\n  --tokenizer google/gemma-3-27b-it"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "gemma",
+      "gguf",
+      "quantization"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/14753",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/14766"
+    },
+    "reactions": 34,
+    "comments": 21,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU with sufficient VRAM, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:45:22.222Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
